result.reason: The issue describes incorrect behavior regarding remote clipboard synchronization, which is a bug.
result.approach: Modify the VNC clipboard handling logic to prevent premature updates of the remote clipboard, ensuring it only updates when a copy action is performed or a paste is initiated. This likely involves changes in Connection.Protocol.VNC.cs related to VNCEvent_ClipboardChanged and FillServerClipboard().
